title: Rules
doc_html:
§356. Rules

            The State Board of Elementary and Secondary Education shall promulgate rules and regulations to implement the provisions of this Part in accordance with the Administrative Procedure Act.

            Acts 2015, No. 389, §1, eff. July 1, 2015.
doc_text:
§356.  Rules
The State Board of Elementary and Secondary Education shall promulgate rules and
regulations to implement the provisions of this Part in accordance with the Administrative
Procedure Act.
Acts 2015, No. 389, §1, eff. July 1, 2015.
